current_life_events: The user just wrapped up a late shift at the shop, feeling the sudden weight of managing the business alone after the breakup. They have been avoiding the close-knit friend group, noticing the awkward silence at recent gatherings. The day ended with a phone call from a supplier demanding payment, adding to the mounting responsibilities.
mental_state: Feeling a deep sense of loss and exhaustion, the user is also anxious about the future of the business and their personal life.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The recent business challenges and the isolation from friends have made the emotional fallout from the breakup feel immediate, prompting the user to seek support today.
